titleStmt.title: SII 16.326: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 326. (A.R. No. 807 of 1917.) BAYANAGUṆṬAPALLI, HAMLET OF KOṆḌĀPURAM, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock near the Mādhavarāyasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1560, Bahudhānya, corresponding to 1683 A.D.

The record is damaged. It registers a grant of the villages Ādiṁseṭṭipalle and Bayanaguṇṭa included in Mallela-sthala, which together with Vōnavōlu formed the agrahāra called Kamalājapuram in Penukoṇḍa-rājya, to Appaya, son of China-Nāgappa and grandson of Mallela Bhāskara Achyutayya of the Bhāradvāja-gōtra, Āśvalāyanasūtra and Ṛik-s11ākha, by Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Narasiṁha-nāyuḍu, son of Nārappanāyuḍu and grandson of Mallappa-nāyuḍu of Rākallu for worship and offerings to god Veṅkaṭēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1560 Agunēṭi bahu dhānyasaṁvatsara
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra veṁkaṭapatirāyadēvamahārāya layyavāru pṛthvisāṁbrāṁjyamu
cēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmaddakhilāṁḍakōṭibraṁhmāṁḍanāyaka vēdavēdāṁttavēdya śrīpurāṇa puruṣōttama
śrīveṁkkaṭēśvarasvāmiki pūja dīpārādhana mōdalaina kaiṁkaryālu naḍapiṁcēṭaṁduku bhāradvājagōtraṁ Āśvalāyana
sūtraṁ ·ṛkuśākhādhyāyulaina mallelabhāskaruni Acyutayya pautṛ(lu) laina ciṁna nāgappa putṛlaina Appayyagāriki
śrīmaṁnmmahānāyakācāryulaina rākaṁṭi mallappanāyani pautṛlaina nārappa nāyani putṛlaina nārasiṁhvānāyanigāru yī veṁka
ṭēśvarula pratiṣṭa puṁṇyakālamaṁdu maḍāmalastaḷaṁ būdalināḍu penugoṁḍḍa rājyānaku cellubaḍē malela mahā
grāma sahitamaIna vānavōluku pratināmamaina kamalājapuraṁ Agunēṭi sarvamānyaṁ Agra hāramaṁdu malelastaḷaṁ
lōni Ādiṁseṭipalyānu bayanakuṁṭānu voradarājuceruvu paḍamaṭi ceravu Ārabhyaṁgānu paḍumaṭiki nagaru sume
perumāḷakuṁṭaku dakṣiṇaṁ karaṇika mānyānaku yīśāṁnyapu garupumēragānu yī kuṁṭa tū¨rpumera vacina māḷakuṁṭa tū¨rpu
kuṁṭavilli penupullakuṁṭaku vacina
sēsukoni Āpādamu veṁkaṭeśvarulaku taḷighe dīpārādhanalu modalaina kaiṁkaryāluṁnnu cukoni mahājanāla paṁmatina sarvamānya gānu
Ani yiccina dha¨rmaśāsana yī dha¨rmaśāsanadha¨rmmānidhigānu trivācakaṁgānu
mī putrapautrapāraṁpariyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāyigānu veṁkaṭēśvarulaku taḷighe dīpārādhana
koni sukhānu vuṁḍēdi yī dha¨rmānaku yavaru vērucēsinānu vāri tallitaṁḍrula vāraṇāsi lō vadhiyiṁcina pāpāna bōduru Ani yi
cina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.326 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
